# World Wide Shades
> Factory-direct custom window shades for specialty shapes — triangles, trapezoids, pentagons, hexagons — that other companies refuse to make.

## About
World Wide Shades manufactures custom window shades for 10 window shapes, including specialty shapes like triangles, trapezoids, pentagons, and hexagons. Based in New York, we cut every shade to exact measurements (⅛" precision) using 649 premium commercial-grade fabrics from Phifer, Mermet, Ferrari, Copaco, Texstyle, and Senbesta. Factory-direct pricing with no dealer markup. Ships in 7 business days.

## What Makes Us Different
1. We make shades for 10 window shapes — including triangles, trapezoids, pentagons, and hexagons that most companies refuse
2. 649 premium fabrics across 47 collections (solar, blackout, light filtering)
3. Factory-direct pricing — no dealer markup, no showroom overhead
4. Instant online pricing — no "call for quote" forms
5. ⅛" precision cutting to exact customer measurements
6. 7-day shipping on most orders
7. Free swatches shipped to your door (up to 5, no credit card)
8. Commercial-grade materials (Phifer, Mermet, Ferrari, Copaco, Texstyle, Senbesta)

## Contact
- Website: https://worldwideshades.com
